metadata.title: Acme Health Patient Intake - SOC 2 control implementation

components.title: Acme Health Patient Intake API (GRC-wrapped)
components.description: The cgep-app-starter Patient Intake API (VPC + API Gateway + Lambda + DynamoDB + S3) wrapped with a Terraform GRC baseline that closes six named gaps from GAPS.md and enforces them continuously via an OPA policy suite and a signing pipeline.
components.purpose: Accept patient intake submissions (PHI) and persist them to DynamoDB and S3 under customer-controlled encryption, network isolation, and least-privilege access.

control-implementations.description: SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria implemented by the GRC baseline wrapped around the Acme Health intake workload.

implemented-requirements.description: PHI at rest is encrypted under a customer-managed KMS key (rotation enabled) for both the S3 uploads bucket (GAP-01) and the DynamoDB submissions table (GAP-02), instead of AWS-owned default keys.

links.text: Signed pipeline bundle (terraform plan.json + conftest results). Chain verified via scripts/verify-evidence.sh <run_id> --prefix capstone/runs.

implemented-requirements.description: The Lambda execution role is scoped to the exact actions the handler performs (dynamodb:PutItem, s3:PutObject, kms:GenerateDataKey/Decrypt) instead of dynamodb:* and s3:* (GAP-07). Enforced at plan time by the gap07_iam_least_priv Rego policy.

links.text: Signed pipeline bundle. Chain verified via scripts/verify-evidence.sh.

implemented-requirements.description: The intake Lambda runs inside the VPC's private subnets behind a dedicated egress-only security group, reaching AWS services via S3/DynamoDB gateway endpoints and a KMS interface endpoint instead of the public internet (GAP-05). Enforced by the gap05_lambda_vpc Rego policy.

links.text: Signed pipeline bundle. Chain verified via scripts/verify-evidence.sh.

implemented-requirements.description: The S3 uploads bucket denies any request not using TLS via a bucket policy condition on aws:SecureTransport = false (GAP-03). Enforced by the gap03_s3_tls Rego policy.

links.text: Signed pipeline bundle. Chain verified via scripts/verify-evidence.sh.

implemented-requirements.description: The S3 uploads bucket has versioning enabled so PHI overwrites are recoverable (GAP-04). Enforced by the gap04_s3_versioning Rego policy, which is the control the red demonstration PR intentionally violated to prove the gate blocks.

links.text: Signed pipeline bundle. Chain verified via scripts/verify-evidence.sh.
